entry.title: Re: Did not receive activation e-mail for new S-user ID
entry.content: According to KBA2490845 - New S-user ID did not receive a Welcome e-mail to set their password - SAP for Me - SAP for Me, If the newly created S-User does not receive activation e-mail , please have the user contact SAP ID Service directly by sending an e-mail to sso@sap.com and they will work directly with the S-user to set the password.

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Shaik Azmathulla - January 2025 Edition
entry.content: Well deserved Author Spotlight, @ShaikAzmathulla 👏🏻

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio process governance integration with Shar...
entry.content: Hi, we will be launching SharePoint upload document as a standard integration in teh workflow on 04.02.2025. Hope this helps. Move nd delete objects will be launched later this year.

entry.title: Re: SAP User Experience Update: What’s New for SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud and On-Premise)
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasReiss, 

The system information bar configuration is a cool thing with main/secondary text and color options. The thing is that the config is managed with transports. In 3tier system landscape I would like to have this only in QA and DEV system - not in PROD system. So, I maintain it in DEV, save the config to transport, transport it to QA but not to PROD. In cases where I'd like to have different colors for DEV: do the same but don't transport. And in case of system copies I start again... So it would have been awesome if there is a specific maintenance option per system and not tied to transport. Are there any plans to provide a better handling or did I miss anything? Thanks.

entry.title: How to publish an on-premise CDS View as a fiori tile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have an on-premise cds report created in eclipse that has already been registered as a service under transaction code /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and I am able to view the cds view as a fiori preview application. I would like to know is there a detailed guide on how to publish an on-premise CDS view as a fiori tile?

entry.title: Re: The same Standard Report is throwing Syntax error in one Server and is active in another Server
entry.content: You should first analyze the syntax error, it could be triggered by some other objects, such as ddic structures with different versions or missing in this system.

Hi Semaglt,

The project might be out of sync, please delete the local project file and load the solution from server. This will resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Jayant Saini

entry.title: Re: 1 or 2 S/4HANA instance architecture?
entry.content: I would think you would have one production instance with Meter to Cash and Finance in the same instance.  The "cash" part is likely the biggest source of Accounts Receivable and one instance makes auditing finance easier.

entry.title: Re: How to use SAP Signavio to improve AI usage?
entry.content:
Hi Manuel, 

Thank you for your feedback. However, this would mean that SAP Intelligence alone would not be sufficient as a possible process mining tool to map a digital twin, as Intelligence does not fully map all insights and cannot run simulations. Do I understand that correctly? I would need KYP.AI for this, right? Does SAP have any other options for mapping simulations? Will the collaboration / integration of KYP.AI be further intensified in the near future?

Best regards, 
Christine

entry.title: Relaxed Flow Routings within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
SAP Digital Manufacturing supports routings with a relaxed flow, where SFCs with quantity > 1 can have individual quantities in work at multiple operation activities simultaneously.

As shown below, a SFC with quantity '5' can have individual quantities 'In Work' in multiple Operation Activities at the same time, when relaxed flow is turned on in the routing.

* You can learn more about how to handle SFCs with quantity > 1 in SAP Digital Manufacturing PODs at: Handling SFCs with Lot Size > 1 in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

When relaxed flow is off in the routing, system would not allow and throw an error if you try to start an individual SFC quantity in the next operation activity, without completing the whole SFC quantity in the previous operation activity, as shown below.

To enable relaxed flow, just set 'Relaxed Flow' to 'Yes' in Manage Routings/Recipes app.

'Relaxed Flow' flag is enriched from Master Routings to Order-Specific Routings, which means that if you enable it in a master routing downloaded from ERP, all order-specific routings created afterwards during Order Download from ERP will inherit the same setting, see Enrichment of Order-Specific Objects for more details.

You can also enable 'relaxed flow' setting at both master routing (LOIROU04) and production order (LOIPRO05 V2) levels via Custom XSLT rules in the Manage Integration Workflows app, see:

  • Specifying the Custom Value of Relaxed Flow for a Master Routing
  • Activating Relaxed Flow for Production and Process Orders

For Master Recipes, and consequently Order-Specific Recipes, relaxed flow is enabled by default, as Order POD by design works in a relaxed flow way for process orders.

 
Restrictions
 
Routings with a relaxed flow have a number of restrictions, including:
  • You can only use operation activities, as well as scrap and done actions.
  • You can't use duplicate operation activities as it's impossible for the system to determine the correct activity when the quantity is in queue at multiple places in the routing with the same operation activity in the POD.
  • You can't use embedded or nested routings as an SFC has to traverse multiple routings.
  • The routing activity option Queue Decision doesn't support the Next Operator option. Since this option places the entire quantity in queue at multiple places in the routing, you can't use it in routings with a relaxed flow.
  • Any-order groups and simultaneous groups aren't supported in the POD.
  • Merging, relabeling, and serializing of SFCs isn't supported.
  • Set SFC Quantity API doesn't provide support when you're using a relaxed flow routing.

Learn more at Routings with a Relaxed Flow.

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: How to retrieve the PAN details of a business partner via a CDS view?

entry.title: SAP B1 Minimised Windows Issue
entry.content:
Hello

On SAP B1 when a document/window is minimised it no longer show the text in the tabs along the bottom. Does anyone know how to restore this?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: Re: The same Standard Report is throwing Syntax error in one Server and is active in another Server
entry.content: Thanks a lot Raymond, there were 2 standard tables that were Partially Active in the System, By activating them, the dump issue resolved. Many thanks

entry.title: Re: CAP with PostgreSQL DB alternate to HANA Cloud DB - Part 1
entry.content:
Hi Ramon, 

 

I am also getting the same error.

.List are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')
Proceeding with automatic retry... (2 of 3 attempts left)
Error building cloud model: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class java.util.List (java.lang.String and java.util.List are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')
Proceeding with automatic retry... (1 of 3 attempts left)
Error building cloud model: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class java.util.List (java.lang.String and java.util.List are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')
Process failed.
Use "cf deploy -i 916ad4e9-d4c8-11ef-96a8-eeee0a8e1d6b -a abort" to abort the process.
Use "cf deploy -i 916ad4e9-d4c8-11ef-96a8-eeee0a8e1d6b -a retry" to retry the process.
Use "cf dmol -i 916ad4e9-d4c8-11ef-96a8-eeee0a8e1d6b" to download the logs of the process.

 

 

Thanks 

Ravi

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 
I tried to use the base64 value from one of the images from the odata service I am using currently, 

This works,

then I tried to use the same in the app we were discussing originally, and it works

the issue right now is how can I get the all pictures to view while calling through the formula,
Is the URL I am using not right?
Or what changes should I do to it?
the service is 
the service is: (let's say)
https://dummylink.sap.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZWEB_ORDERING_SRV
and the path to the image I am using is 
https://dummylink.sap.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZWEB_ORDERING_SRV/MaterialSet?$format=json&$select=Image

and by using this no image values are returned while previewing.
Please let me know what I am doing wrong.

Thank You

Best Regards,
Yashmin Behera

entry.title: Introducing the new practice system experience for self-paced learning.
entry.content:
We are excited to unveil our new hands-on experience, designed to streamline and enrich your hands-on practice journey! After listening to your feedback, we have rebuilt, simplified, and improved the accessibility of practice systems!
Enjoy the new way of self-paced hands-on learning.

What is new?

Practice system course material: required materials such as exercise handbooks are available directly on the SAP Learning site.

Course Material

Improved user flows: more intuitive and easier navigation.

Access Practice Systems

The “My Learning" section of the SAP Learning site contains valuable information about the practice system you have enrolled in.  

My Learning - Practice Systems

Our onboarding videos explain how to find, access, and use practice systems: 

Kickstart your learning with bite-sized onboarding videos

Explore the new platform today and experience firsthand the improvements we have made for you. As always, we welcome your feedback to help create the best possible learning experience.

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Client DLLs to be used for XI vs 2020 server.
entry.content:
See my Blog for upgrading:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

And NO you can't have both on the same PC, CR's dll names don't change so you can't have side by side on the same PC.

Go here to read all about CR for VS and links to the references etc.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

entry.title: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts not having option to add co code and G/L account
entry.content: "Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts" not having option to add co code and G/L account in "Schedule Accounting Data Changes" app in test and prod environment. The G/L account has been updated to OIM account in Customizing. However, when I try to run it in Test environment, there is no option to add parameters for company code and G/L accounts.

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q1 2025
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the blog post.

Will the release schedule for QRC updates be shared as well? The date information for all QRC updates was shared in a seperate blog in previous years. It's important for us to see the timeline.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Texts field in Manage Product Master Data
entry.content:
Hi @KhaingZinTun 

 

A CDS view for  Purchasing Texts in the Product Master is not available 

S/4HANA Cloud customers use the API and Entity below instead

https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCT_SRV/path/get_A_Product___Product____to_ProductPurchaseText

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Are you an administrator and want to getting up and running Concur Invoice Payment Manager?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Working with Invoice Pay in Concur Invoice Professional learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey, for administrators, focuses on configuring and maintaining payment configurations using Automated Clearing House (ACH), Virtual Cards, or Checks in Concur Invoice Professional with the Invoice Pay service.

Learning Objectives
After completing this course, administrators will be able to identify and explain the key features of Concur Invoice Payment Manager including how to configure and maintain ACH, Virtual Cards, and Check payments, to ensure payments are made accurately and on-time to vendors. 

Prerequisites

  • Administrators should have a basic understanding of Concur Invoice and the Procure to Pay process.  

 Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Consumption/Adjusting the usage Cycle to PRT in Publi...

Hi All,

I have activated standard My Inbox application. However the upload and send email functionality doesnt work. 

The upload functionality gives a Message attachment is uploaded, however the attachments are not saved.If I refresh the view it goes away. I checked the network call, no call is going to backend either.

My Inbox version activated is 2.2.18.

Please help me with this issue

entry.title: Re: Is there bulk Create, bulk Copying of BOM? in SAP S/4...
entry.content:
Hi @SI_y_Ito 

 

In the Maintain Bill of Material app a copy option is available but only works for one bom

 

There is no other apps available for mass maintenance apart from the ones shown in your screenshot 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: aseuserstore and dbisql
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way using ASE dbisql (Interactive SQL) utility with the aseuserstore? JDBC uses the SECURE_STORE_KEY property, but you can't start dbisql without username and password.

Thanks

Robert

entry.title: SAP VIM - Invalid DP Data error on approval of contract
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

in tcode /opt/vim_wp theres an approval button. after 1st attempt of clicking the approval button no error occured but if tried to go back to the previous screen and click the approval button again the error "Invalid DP Data" occured

has anyone experienced this error ? dou you guys have any ideas on what could be the root cause of the issue? this is only happening in Contract Type PO and note that plant is empty in ekpo table because it is part of the company processes (not sure if it is related to the error encountered)

Enda

(Note : don't create custom icons ,it will work only any action based ) 

Thank you..

entry.title: How to properly hide a custom column in a Fiori Elements app with OData V4?
entry.content:
Dear Fiori experts, I hope you can help me with the problem I'm facing.

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using Flexible Programming Model that we're trying to have as much metadata-driven as possible. OData interface is V4. One of my tasks is to implement a custom column with quite sophisticated set of microchartbars, therefore, I'm doing it on frontend by using CDS as my source of data. No problems so far, I've implemented this custom column in my manifest and custom xml template:

My problem is that its availability has to be dependent of another criterion, such as whether or not a user has some particular authorization. This authorization check is done on backend via custom entity and is exposed as an entity set in my OData V4 service, which I read in the onInit method in my List Page controller extension. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to hide this custom column completely if authority check fails. My best bet so far was to use .setIgnoredFields method in .onBeforeRendering method in my List Page controller extension, but for some reason setIgnoredFields works only with columns that come from backend (Plant, Material, etc.), but it totally ignores if I put there my custom column name, no matter what. In the below example it will hide Plant column entirely, but leaves ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn column.

I tried "ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", "DataField::

ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", etc. - no effect. What am I doing wrong and how to do it properly?

I also tried to use all sorts of expression bindings for "availability" in the manifest, but it seems this property is immune to it...

I appreciate every bit of help.

we have same requirement.

Thanks and regards.

Shital

entry.title: Re: Git: /bin/bash: warning: setlocale: LC_ALL: cannot ch...
entry.content: I have the same issue.

entry.title: Introducing Joule on Hands-on Practice Sandbox
entry.content:
We are excited to announce to have Joule integrated into our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition sandbox.

Accessible with SAP Learning Hub subscription, sandbox systems help to explore, test, experiment, build use cases, and get a first look and feel of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. Suitable for all roles and levels, it is filled with sample data that you can use to explore the functionality, experiment with scenarios, and test your results.

Joule helps to simplify your work

Joule, SAP’s generative AI copilot, revolutionizes how you interact with your SAP business systems, making every touchpoint count and every task simpler.

Joule is packed with powerful features that will transform how you engage with the practice system. Now you can benefit from Joule to:

  • Find and quickly navigate to applications for your next task.
  • Get fast insights on business data, such as purchase orders and outbound deliveries.
  • Receive help from user enablement content summarized in a crisp answer.

Joule

Watch this video to see Joule in action: >> GROW with SAP - Joule - The AI Copilot <<

Ready to get started?

We believe that learners thrive when they have the freedom to explore. That’s why we encourage you to experiment with Joule in our hands-on practice sandbox to see how it best fits your learning needs.

With a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription access the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition sandbox system and start testing.

Click the Joule icon at the top navigation and dive in:

Top Navigation

Start asking your questions in natural language, for example:

  • “What is a purchase order?”
  • “In which application can I see purchase orders?”
  • “Show me purchase order 4500000912”

 Also, check out the free “Exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio" learning journey on the SAP Learning site to learn more about Joule and SAP Business AI.

 

You can find more information about sandbox systems here:

New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to ... - SAP Community

 

SAP News Article on Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: https://news.sap.com/?p=230358

 

Documentation on SAP Help Portal:  https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/82a14f108cfa4d4788244d81371e072b/a955cb79db3c4f5c89ed3f00bb05f080.html?locale=en-US&version=CLOUD

 

Note: To access Joule within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, an additional entitlement and authorization may be required. Please consult your account executive for more information.

 

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q1 2025
entry.content:
HI @metinhturkmen 

All QRC updates for Q1 2025 are now available in the What's New Viewer: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/42e4f84a0e5e458792b1047eaf81c31a?locale=en-US

These changes will be made on February 15th

Thanks,

Orla

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : The document could not be opened
entry.content: already installed

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Minimised Windows Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the Main Menu > Windows > Click on the window which you want to open from all the opened and minimized to restore it back on window.

Also, check if the same is the working on the DEMO database latest FP. If similar and then you can using the support launchpad report the same. Include the Business Impact of the same.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Benefit From SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Pack Stack 02
entry.content:
Hi @Mark63 ,

Thanks for the Blog! Is there ant way we can experiment / configure Generative AI summary of changes in central governance (classic mode)? we are currently doing an Upgarde and would like to explore this?

Thanks, Piyush Sakharkar.

entry.title: Re: Going to import item master details through DTW
entry.content:
Hi,

Check the below link to import Items and specifically page 12 which mentions about Item groups.

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelpiis_hc_b1_image_repository_consultant_training_basic_b1_90_tb1200_04_04_pdf/9.0/en-US/B1_90_TB1200_04_04.pdf

You can create item groups and warehouses manually, or use the DTW templates OITB – ItemGroups and OWHS – Warehouses. These templates are found under the Administration > Setup > Inventory folder.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: IDOC_ERROR_PARSE_FAILURE: Illegal value "" for attribute SEGMENT in <EDI_DC40 SEGME
entry.content: I have ever only seen it mapped as a constant of "1" so I do think that is what you would want to ensure it works.

entry.title: Re: Extending Standard Fiori Application By Extending Standard OData Service In Sap Gateway
entry.content:
Hello , thank you for the detailed explanation, i have  2 doubts:

1. In the blog you have created a new service, how this is called by the standard Fiori app? 

2. If we tick "replace base service" while generating the zproject, do we still need to register the service?

Can you please clarify?

entry.title: Re: Validation on template correctness for file upload in...
entry.content: Thanks so much Anirban. Is there any SAP document or video which I can refer to get screenshot of these error screens to know in detail. Thanks

entry.title: Re: ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts
entry.content: Probably have one or more JCo scenarios active if you have already updated all RFC channels.

entry.title: how to delete obsolete files from the content server in sap
entry.content:
Could you please let us the options of deleting obsolete files from the iContent server, that would help save some space.

 

Is this recommended or do you see some pitfalls already. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: ServerCrash
entry.content:
Hello, you are welcome!

Was that from a "core" file related to the ICM crash? The c-stack does not look like it is related to the ICM.

General comments that I can still make:

  • the kernel in use (749 patch 600) is fom 2018 (!), and the kernel 749 is not supported anymore (since 2023, refer to the SAP Note 1969546).
  • I have found the SAP Notes 2795949 and 2800543, which address crashes in the ICM and are applicable to the kernel in use. We just do not know (with the information on this thread) whether the crash you faced is from those SAP Notes. In any case, you should consider upgrading the SAP kernel to 753 or 754.

entry.title: Re: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Activate (create) an extension using pgAdmin tool
entry.content:
Hi 

Not sure, no applications available in my trial account and deleted apps and routes from trial account. I am using latest cf8.

Thanks 

Ravi

entry.title: Batch Inbound Integration - Use of element "ChangeOrdinalNumberValue"
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to use SOAP API Batch Inbound Integration:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9ce855c709ce4f5c99b685903461106e/d51b13a65cc744cf97a28a19e617d9dd.html?version=2408.500
https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BATCHBULKRPLCTNINFORMATION-v1/overview

for creating new batches and updating existing batches.
Not clear to us is the use of element ChangeOrdinalNumberValue. We noticed that setting a vlaue for this field is required since SAP otherwise rejects/ignores this request (see screenshot).
Therefore we set ChangeOrdinalNumberValue to 1, as result the batch were created. 
For updates we need to set a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue otherwise requests get ignored as well.

Our first idea was to read the current ChangeOrdinalNumberValue of an existing batch by using ODATA API "Batch Master Record" (similar to eTag Handling for OData APIs) and to increase this number by 1:

https://api.sap.com/api/API_BATCH_SRV/path/get_Batch

Unfortunately this API doesn"t provide ChangeOrdinalNumberValue in it"s response. 
Our current idea is to convert the current timestamp to an unix timestamp an use this as the ChangeOrdinalNumberValue so that we have always a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue for more recent requests.

What is best practices for ChangeOrdinalNumberValue or how did SAP foreseen ChangeOrdinalNumberValue handling with an external system?

Thanks and best regards

Robert

entry.title: SAP IDM: Limit access to own account
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to limit access to their own account for all IDM users so that they cannot make self-allocations.

Either not the possibility of searching their user or not being able to access the modification screens on their account

Would you have a solution for me, please?

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: how to convert JSON to ABAP
entry.content:
This is my JSON response,

{ "status": 500 ,
"reason": " Internal Server Error ",
"response": " {"status":500,
"payload":{"errorType":"Error",
"errorMessage":"{\"statusCode\":404,
\"status\":\"Error Halo Cancel request failed for notification no: 85004240, inspection id: mqp4_09062023_1: Request failed with status code 404\",
\"body\":\"Error Halo Cancel request failed for notification no: 85004240, inspection id: mqp4_09062023_1\"}",
"trace":["Error: {\"statusCode\":404,
\"status\":\"Error Halo Cancel request failed for notification no: 85004240, inspection id: mqp4_09062023_1: Request failed with status code 404\",
\"body\":\"Error Halo Cancel request failed for notification no: 85004240, inspection id: mqp4_09062023_1\"}",
" at respondByThrowingError (/var/task/src/index.js:34:9)",
" at Runtime.exports.handler (/var/task/src/index.js:71:7)",
" at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:96:5)"]
}
} "
}

How to convert this into internal table or ABAP perspective?

Tried Deserialize method but not working.

Can anyone tell or suggest?

entry.title: Re: How to call RAP static action from elements FPM exten...
entry.content:
Hello,

Would you like to share to complete method call?

Im facing the same issue 🙂

Thanks!
Mattijs Happé

entry.title: Re: Access $user.attr in a CDS projection
entry.content:
Found it by myself... This does the trick.

 

 @restrict: [
        {
            grant: [ 'READ' ],
            where: 'ldapDn IN ($user.LDAP_Groups)'
        }
    ]
    @readonly
    entity LDAPGroups as
        projection on app.LDAPGroups;

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Hello @Matthew_Shaw 

I am seeking help regarding best practices for handling User ID in SAC during provisioning from Azure to IAS and then from IAS to SAC. 

When provisioning users from Azure (UPN) to IAS, the UPN (email) is mapped to the Login Name field in IAS.

This Login Name is then provisioned to SAC in the USER ID field. The problem occurs because SAC does not allow the USER ID to be an email address, which leads to the error message:

Request is unparsable, syntactically incorrect, or violates schema.

To clarify, the process works as follows:

  • Azure: UPN (email)
  • IAS: Login Name (email)
  • SAC: USER ID (email not allowed)

We do not want the USER ID in IAS to be an email address. However, we also don’t want to use first name + last name as the USER ID (that is our UPN-Azure), since there are multiple users with the same first and last names.

Our preference would be to set the USER ID in SAC as the Employee ID, but the problem is that users in Azure cannot log in with the Employee ID. 

What are the best practices for creating a User ID in SAC ? How can we structure the USER ID in SAC ?

How can the above-mentioned error be resolved?

 

Many thanks

Best Regards

  •

entry.title: Re: creating wsdl from xml file
entry.content: Well, the XSD is part of the WSDL too. So at least he could derive an XSD from the XML and then use the XSD to build the WSDL. Some parts of the WSDL will have to be added manually, like operations, ports/server urls etc.

entry.title: Create user by API on BTP subaccount
entry.content:
Hello all,

I've been working with BTP lately. In our company we have one global account with multiple subaccounts. We have an application deployed on the subaccount and we have to create several users on that subaccount.

But we do it manually as I show on the image, which can be tedious with large list:

Is there a way on doing it by API? If yes, can you show how the call should be?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Not able to preview app in BAS
entry.content:
SAP doesn't seem to be too interested in fixing this issue with BAS, probably because this only affects the on-premise systems.

They've fixed other Preview issues with BAS, but this one seems to keep falling through the cracks, mysteriously.

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM Intergrate several file
entry.content:
Hello,

actually IDM does the things well because when we say in source the suffix of files +'*' to load them in a temporary table via a "FROM ASCII FILE" task it loads all the files in this one.

entry.title: SAP BUILD APP: Error in the build(Deploy)
entry.content:
Hello,

I have my app created in SAP Build APP Edition Free and I cannot generate any version, neither in ipa nor in apk, when other times I had generated them without problems.

It doesn't allow me to use any version other than 4.12.166.

Is anyone in the same situation?

Do you know how to solve it?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to provision user identities into Concur using Identity Provisioning
entry.content:
Hi @rc_pratka,

did you found a solution to assign roles to the provisionised users?
I tried it similiar to your approach, but I receive the same error message like you.

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: Re: SAP Dynamic Forms 2411 Released Features
entry.content: Hi @WilliamChou When exactly the support for Dynamic forms in Fiori apps F2071, F2175, F5104A will be available?

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to bulk rename the document in Producer or Script?
entry.content: Dear Anton, I would be interested in these Link, unfortunatety I get only Error while trying to open. Could you please check if they are still current? Thank you 🙂 Enjoy your weekend!

entry.title: Re: No product cost collector could be determined for material XXXXXX , in CO01
entry.content: How did you do?

entry.title: Re: SAM2110 Synchronization Start Time Stamp
entry.content: There is one important table /SYCLO/MBL01. This contains the timestamp for the mobile status updates from SSAM.

entry.title: Re: Validation on template correctness for file upload in...
entry.content:
Hi SHweta,You can check out the MDG community page for videos on mass processing with data quality management. https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/master-data-governance/how-to

You can check out my blog as well to get some brief idea on how error handling looks in mass processing.

MDG DQM:Employing rules in central governance & ma... - SAP Community

MDG DQM: Empowering Your Business with High-Qualit... - SAP Community

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content: In DataSphere Trial Account - I had to ensure that my DWC Graphical View was - set to Analytical DataSet - (Deprecated)( Note : Fact dint work for me). Now, to view the space in SAC , I created connection to DataSphere, Created Classic Design Story which gave me the option to connect to DataSphere , my space and Analytical DataSet.

entry.title: Re: Add new empty rows in Oops ALV Custom container
entry.content: I do not understand. Where is the problem? Just append 10 empty rows to internal table...

entry.title: Re: How to fetch data from MDF for Document Generation wh...
entry.content:
HI,

For multiple data seen in document you can use table properties in document template.

You set rows 1, columns 2. Then system generate teble for you. İn table you write [[phone number]] and map it token in Manage Document Template Mapping as direct contact info-phone number.

Then when you generate document if person have 2 contacts you will see both of them in the table. Table properties is used for multiple data types.

 

And if you want only generate one of them, you can write business rule for that, and then mapp this with rule .

entry.title: SAP B1 user deactivated. Too many invalid connect attempts
entry.content:
Hello! I am facing this issue. Sometimes i cannot connect to database in SBO as it says that connection to database lost. After some investigations i found out that database user gets locked for invalid connect attempts. And the only way is to copy database with a new name. 

Activate button in SAP HANA Studio does not work. 

Reset connection attempts SQL query also does not work.

I wanted to know which table, or file contain unsuccessful logins to prevent this situations.

And one more thing, i connect to database using Service Layer (i have mobile app), use Calculation views and direct queries

entry.title: Re: How to fetch data from MDF for Document Generation wh...
entry.content:
Additionally you can look this note - 2387814 - Document Generation - How to map Pay Component data to a Document Template

This is other example for using table properties

entry.title: Re: Signavio overview user and used licences
entry.content: Like Shawn mentioned we report out via groups as well. E.g. Enterprise Plus is always combined with a Process Modeler group which is also required for authorization purpose.

entry.title: Re: Details about HANA LOBs
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

Thanks and keep up the good work!
BR Dominik

entry.title: WS-Security method configuration for SOAP receiver channel
entry.content:
I am trying to change the authentication method from NTLM to WS_Security method in SAP PI 7.5. Its a SOAP to SOAP scenario. 

This is my first time working on this authentication method. I don't have an idea on where to start, what are the pre-requisites for this and how can I implement this?

Can anyone please help me with this?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Reuse of ECC custom field at S/4HANA with Clean Core principles
entry.content:
Introduction

A lot of customers have added custom fields to customer master. At system conversion from ECC to SAP S/4HANA you have to reimplement custom fields to BP transaction may based on blog post

SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement

If you now want to reimplement this field in Master Data Fiori Apps you have to prepare this enhancement based on clean core principles.

SAP S/4HANA offers robust customization options, but maintaining a clean core is essential for system stability and simplified future upgrades. This guide covers adding custom database fields to standard Fiori apps while adhering to SAP's Clean Core principles.

In this blog post I will focus on fields of customer master data which maybe are already implemented at transaction BP.

Target audience: Functional expert, Development expert

 

Clean Core Principles

The Clean Core approach emphasizes minimal custom code and maximum use of standard SAP solutions, ensuring a stable and efficient system.

For more information on Clean Core principles, you can refer to following documents

ERP Clean Core Point-of-view

ERP clean core strategy

 

Preparation

Before adding custom fields, it’s crucial to ensure that your existing setup aligns with the Clean Core principles. Check out the blog post Convert Manually Created Append Fields to Real Key User Custom Fields for detailed steps. Additional information you can find at blog post Adding Custom database Field to standard Fiori apps in S/4HANA with Custom Fields and Logic

If field is implemented already in CVI and BP (SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement)
Delete Z-field from CVI structure CVIS_EI_EXTERN as preparation (delete this from DATA and DATAX structures). It will be added later on with FIORI App "Custom Fields" enablement.

If field is not implemented yet or has been removed from structure CVIS_EI_EXTERN (field is only available at KNA1) you can proceed with following steps.

 

 

Start with ATO (Adaptation Transport Organizer) Setup

If you start transaction SCFD_EUI, you will get the following pop-up to set up ATO:

 

Step into ATO Setup for configuration:

If not done already, you can use a setup similar to this:

For ATO Setup, ensure the green traffic light appears at the top of the screen.

 

Check Activation Status

Run Transaction SCFD_EUI

Enter the database table and field.

Standard pattern for custom fields is setup with ZZ but original source of my example is an ECC system where custom fields start with Z. 

You will see your Z-field, which is marked as "Preparation Required."

 

Prepare the Field

Push the "Prepare" button to see the preparation details.

Click on one of the lines to see more detailed information about the ToDos:

Main Content in short: Move the Z-Field from the Z-Append-Structure to the standard enhancement structure INCL_EEW_KNA1, which is supported by the Clean Core approach.

 

Move Z-Field to Standard Enhancement Structure

To minimize data loss risk, activate both steps in one mass activation:

  1. Remove the field from the Append.
  2. Add the field to the Append in the Extension Include Structure.

Attention: Do not activate these two steps separately! Activating them separately may result in data loss.

Refer to SAP Note 3104595 - SCFD_EUI: Minimize risk for data loss when moving extension fields for more details on minimizing data loss risks:

 

Adjust Table in ABAP Dictionary

Run Transaction SE11:

Select table KNA1.

Here you can see your "old" Append Structure and the new target structure.

 

Create a New Append Structure

Assign your custom field from the "old" custom structure to the extensibility structure INCL_EEW_KNA1 by creating a new Append Structure at extensibility structure INCL_EEW_KNA1.

Save Changes

DO NOT activate.

 

Delete Custom Field from Old Append Structure

Save Changes

DO NOT activate them yet.

 

Mass Activation

Run Report RADMASG0_C3

Enter the new and old append structures into the Direct Object selection.

Run in Parallel as Background Job

Note: This process may take a long time (approximately 1.5 hours) due to the many dependencies of KNA1.

If you check the logs after activation, you may see errors. Ignore these for now; they will be corrected in the next step.

 

Delete Old Append Structure

After adding all custom fields to the new extensibility structure and activating them, you can delete the "old" append structure using transaction SE11.

This process will take some time. After activation, check if your data is still available in table KNA1 by running SE16N. Before that, check the table structure of KNA1.

 

Enable Field for Use in App "Custom Fields"

Check Activation Status Again

Transaction SCFD_EUI:

Enter the database table and field and confirm the notification.

As you can see, the custom field is now ready for activation and can be enabled.

You will get a proposal for the technical Fiori field. Note the difference between the technical database field (ZCUST) and the technical Fiori field (ZZ1_ZCUST).

Confirm the proposal pop-up. There will be additional pop-ups asking for development package and transport request details.

After enablement, you will see the following status:

Now your field is ready for the Fiori app "Custom Fields." With this enablement, the custom field has been added to CVI structure CVIS_EI_EXTERN automatically.

 

Enable field in Fiori App "Custom Fields"

Open Fiori App "Custom Fields"

As you can see, your new/"old" custom field is shown with the status "Published."

To check activation status click on the Field Name and Check Technical Object Activation. As an example, activate the field for the following technical objects to use in the Fiori app "Manage Customer Master."

For additional activation, it’s up to your requirements. A big advantage of this Fiori app is automatic enhancement of structures, IDOCs, OData Services, WebServices etc. by just clicking "Enable". Everything else is done automaicly in background.

 

Final Step: Extend Fiori Apps with Custom Fields

For more information on extending Fiori apps with custom fields, refer to the blog post: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Extend FIORI App "Manage Customer Master" with Z-field. Here you can skip the part Z-field definition and you can run Technical Object Activation directly.

 

Conclusion

Adding custom database fields to standard Fiori apps while maintaining a Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA involves several steps. By following these guidelines, you can ensure compliance, minimal custom code, and a stable system.

no such thing.

you have to create fiori app for it.

Miguel Vivan

entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am new to SAP CPI, we have a requirement to update a custom field in position entity using the value from a user entity ie bench strength.

How to link both entities as Position has same user multiple times.

How to pick position entity with user linked and latest enty.

Any leads would be welcome.

entry.title: I need to use custom rap api in intgeration suite but i am getting error when loading the metadata

I need to use the api that is created in abap cloud in the integration suite but when i am accessing the metatdata in the odata v2 entity selection i am getting this error.

thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Where to link Web Dynpro application user interface a...
entry.content:
The application configuration to the user roles can be set via PFCG t-code. Then these roles will be assigned to users to control the application access.

The answer would be 'Application configuration of the Role'.

entry.title: Re: Issue with nested if-then formula in compensation wor...
entry.content:
As Xavier mentioned, try breaking your formula down.

Remember the syntax is if(condition, true, false). When using multiple if's, you will have your "true" value after each "if" and then at the end have your "false". In your formula you aren't doing this properly on each line.

For example:

What do you want to happen for the first line? The second line? What happens if someone's DefLocal is en_US or en_GB? Are you maybe missing some "&&" and "||" conditions? I think you're getting N/A's because you have some flaws in your conditions/logic.

if(payGuideMin>0 && payGuideMax>0 && customCurRate>0 && customDefLocale !="" ,
if(customDefLocale="en_US" || customDefLocale="en_GB",

For these two lines you want "Below Min" when the rate is less than the min and "Above Max" when rate is above the max but in the above first 2 lines you haven't given the "true" condition when these criteria are met.if(customCurRate<payGuideMin,"Below Min",
if(customCurRate>payGuideMax,"Above Max",

I suggest building out your formula in smaller pieces so that you can easily see where the formula/you are going wrong and it will help you to correct the issues.

entry.title: Re: 3383785 - Prerequisite Objects for Enable NFCom (Electronic Nota Fiscal for Telecommunication Se
entry.content: Hi João, how are you? Have you solved this problem yet? If you have, please let me know what this error "aCI DDIC missing..." is and how you fixed it. I have the same error, but after implementing note 3352044. Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Organizational Change Management Starterkit – Zusammenfassung der Kaffee-Ecke Januar 2025
entry.content:
Zum Jahresauftakt 2025 stellte Anja Scheurer, Senior Change Management Beraterin bei SAP, das Organizational Change Management (OCM) – Starter Kit vor.  Dieses Framework dient als Hilfestellung bei der Implementierung von Organizational Change Management (OCM) in SAP-Projekten.

In der Kaffee-Ecke haben wir zum Check-In gefragt wer der Teilnehmenden ein OCM Framework in der Organisation hat und nutzt. Laut Poll haben nur 30% ein solches Framework.

Das Starterkit ist in Form eines digitalen Buches im SAP Enable Now Info Center zugänglich und beinhaltet:

  • Detaillierte Erläuterungen zu OCM-Methoden und -Prozessen
  • Einsatzbereite Vorlagen und Templates für verschiedene OCM-Aktivitäten
  • Schrittweise Anleitungen zur praktischen Umsetzung von Change Management

Mit einem S-User und Universal ID kann es jeder kostenfrei ansehen und herunterladen. SAP Enable Now Kunden können es zudem importieren und anpassen.

Vorstellung des SAP OCM Startkits

Das Starterkit orientiert sich an den verschiedenen Dimensionen des OCM Framework der SAP welches die wesentlichen Tätigkeiten im Change Management beschreibt.

  • Change Strategie
  • Change Leadership
  • Change Kommunikation
  • Change Realisierung
  • Change Effektivität

Verwendung des OCM Starterkits

  • Einstieg zu Beginn des Projekts für die Staffing und Scoping
  • Aufklärung über die Change Methodik im Projektteam
  • Befähigungsmaterial für Change Agents

Hauptbestandteile des Starterkits

Anbei eine kurze Zusammenfassung der verschiedenen Themenbereiche und was jeweils wichtige  Aufgaben sind.

Change-Strategie

  • Durchführung eines umfassenden Change Assessments zur Bewertung der Ausgangssituation
  • Erstellung eines detaillierten Konzepts und Plans für das Change Management im Projekt

Change-Führung

  • Durchführung einer gründlichen Stakeholder-Analyse zur Identifikation und Bewertung relevanter Interessengruppen
  • Aufbau und Management eines effektiven Change Agent Netzwerks zur Unterstützung der Veränderungsprozesse

Change-Kommunikation

  • Entwicklung eines strukturierten Kommunikationsplans für alle Projektphasen
  • Nutzung verschiedener Kommunikationskanäle zur zielgruppengerechten Informationsvermittlung

Befähigung & Training

  • Planung und Durchführung von zielgerichteten Trainings zur Vorbereitung der Mitarbeitenden auf die Veränderungen

Effektivitätsmessung

  • Regelmäßige Durchführung von Umfragen zur Bewertung der Wirksamkeit der Change-Maßnahmen
  • Implementierung von Readiness Checks vor dem Go-Live zur Überprüfung der Bereitschaft
  • Durchführung von User Adoption Messungen nach dem Go-Live zur Evaluierung der tatsächlichen Nutzung

Datengestütztes Change Management - Deep Transformation Insights (DTI)

Zentral und bildlich in der Mitte des Modells ist der Umgang mit Daten. Dabei hilft der Service “DTI” ein übergreifenden Verständnisses des aktuellen Zustands aus Perspektive der Mitarbeitenden zu erlangen und datengestützt Change Maßnahmen abzuleiten.

Nutzung eines Dashboards zur periodischen Messung und Visualisierung von Mitarbeiter-Sentimenten. Sentimente sind Meinungen und Empfindungen. Sie werden im Framework in die Bereiche Awareness, Acceptance, Enablement, Empowerment, Commitment gruppiert.

  • S. auch einen Podcast zum Thema DTI

Diskussion und Fragen

Findet man hier irgendwo die Zuordnung zu den SAP Activate Phasen?

  • Noch nicht im Starterkit, jedoch im Activate Roadmap Explorer in der OCM Sektion – siehe der Blog Professionelles Change Management mit dem SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer 

Ist eine Integration von Learning Services wie Lern-Bedarfsanalyse als Teil des Starterkits gewünscht?

  • Diese Frage von Anja wurde von mehreren Teilnehmenden ausdrücklich bejaht – es ist gewünscht.

Welche Definition zwischen Projektmanagement Leistungen und Change Management Leistungen empfiehlt sich im Sinne einer Rollenschärfung?

  • Üblicherweise gibt es Projektmanagement Verantwortliche, und OCM Verantwortliche in SAP Einführungsprojekten. Eine klare Abgrenzung der Verantwortlichkeiten zwischen Projektmanagement und Change Management ist hilfreich.
  • Durchführung einer detaillierten Rollendefinition zu Projektbeginn, idealerweise unter Verwendung einer RACI-Matrix
  • Vollständige Integration der Change Management-Aktivitäten in den übergeordneten Projektplan
  • Hier eine Tn Stimme: Ich habe hauptsächlich mit Consultants zu tun, die sich individuell mit den Unsicherheiten, Bedenken und Widerständen und "Arbeitsverweigerungen" der Projektbeteiligten auf Kundenseite herumschlagen müssen. Abteilung z.B.). Falls OCM im Projekt nicht im Orgchart vorkommt, können solch zentralen Verantwortungen helfen.

Einschätzung des Anteils von SAP-Projekten, die ohne strukturiertes OCM durchgeführt werden

  • Sehr viel mehr Projekte aus meiner Sicht beachten OCM, aber bei weitem noch nicht alle. Manche der Change Verantwortungen werden aber durch zentrale, Projekt unabhängige Rollen, übernommen (Kommunikationsverantwortliche für die Abteilung z.B.). Falls OCM im Projekt nicht im Orgchart vorkommt, können solch zentralen Verantwortungen helfen.

Wie können wir noch mehr Stakeholder überzeugen, in Change Management zu investieren

  • Das ist regelmäßig ein wichtiges Thema. Der datenbasierte objektive Ansatz kann schonmals helfen.
  • Nutzung von Erfahrungen und Lessons Learned aus früheren Projekten zur Untermauerung der Argumentation für OCM
  • Einsatz kreativer Ansätze wie Storytelling, um die Bedeutung und den Mehrwert von Change Management zu verdeutlichen

Inspirierende Aussagen

"Change Management ist kein reines IT-Projekt, sondern ein ganzheitliches Business-Projekt."

"Der Mensch ist der entscheidende Faktor, der ein System letztendlich zum Leben erweckt."

"Selbst die beste technische Umsetzung kann sich als kostspielige Fehlinvestition erweisen, wenn sie von den Mitarbeitern nicht angenommen wird."

"Als Change Manager müssen wir auch versierte Storyteller sein, um die Notwendigkeit des Wandels überzeugend zu vermitteln."

"Die Aussage 'Wir brauchen kein Change Management' gehört zu den potenziell teuersten Fehleinschätzungen in Projekten."

Anja geht das auch gerne humorvoll an und stellt z.B. als Icebreaker in Meetings die teuersten Sätze der Welt vor.

Resümee

Das SAP Change Management Starterkit bietet eine umfassende und praxisorientierte Unterstützung für organizational Change Management in SAP-Projekten. Es deckt wesentlichen Aspekte des Change Managements ab und stellt konkrete, anwendbare Werkzeuge zur Verfügung.

Die Diskussion verdeutlichte, dass Change Management nach wie vor eine signifikante Herausforderung in vielen Projekten darstellt, jedoch zunehmend als kritischer Erfolgsfaktor anerkannt wird. Nutzer-Feedback ist herzlich Willkommen um weitere Angebote an Kunden zu gestalten.

Wer noch keinen SAP User hat: anbei gibt es Informationen zur Universal ID.

Weiterführende Links

Das Organizational Change Management (OCM) – Starter Kit

SAP Change Basecamp Workshop:  Veränderungsmanagement erlernen und anwenden am praxisnahen Beispiel. Der Workshop ist nun buchbar für den 9 - 10 April, 26 - 27 Juni, 22 - 23 Oktober sowie am 26 - 27 November.

Neue Learning Journey: Acting as Professional Change Manager in SAP Cloud Projects

Die nächste Kaffee-Ecke findet zum Thema adaptive Transformation mit Eike Wagner in der Change Hut im Zillertal statt – Anmeldung findet ihr wie immer hier auf der Website der Kaffee-Ecke .

entry.title: Re: Which Options are true of non-Sap Hana-based standard...
entry.content:
Hi Johannes,

I've included the link below for the Configuration of MDG Consolidation.

Please refer Configure Standardization and Configure Validation topics.

link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MASTER_DATA_GOVERNANCE/a992d0f4d9394a50915ab382b7a62b0f/869b1154aeb08a24e10000000a4450e5.html?version=MDG80.SP18&q=standardization%2520consolidation

Most of the options are HANA Based i.e. Fuzzy Search, Filter, Matching options. However the BAS interface is independent of HANA. And also Validation with backend settion and configuration is not dependent on HANA.

Thanks,
Vivek

entry.title: Transport management
entry.content: I'm pretty new to development and looking for learning journeys around transports and transport management. More specifically, copy of transports.

entry.title: SAP Community Enhancements - January 2024
entry.content:
While you were probably (at least we hope) enjoying some well-deserved time off during the winter holidays, we have been busy and have just released the following enhancements to our SAP Community.

A New Sort Option Has Come to Town

There had previously been a sort option "Creation Date" in the Product and Technology boards.  This sort option has been added to Groups now.  So, when viewing discussion threads within Groups, users have the option to sort by "Creation Date."  While there has always been a sort option for "Most Recent," this does not equate to the original creation date of the thread.  The "Creation Date" option is now available within the Sort By drop-down list.

 

Yes!  There's a (Subscribe) Button for That

Have you ever absorbed by a blog or discussion content and wished you could be notified of any and all responses and comments at the push of a button?  Well, now you can.  A subscribe button now appears on the top-right of the respective content.  No need to fumble around in a drop-down list.  You want it, just hit the button and its yours.  All the notifications when comments/answers are posted to a blog/discussion are now yours!

 

Time and Time Again

Time for posted events is typically shown in the time zone determined in the user's profile.  However, what if the user is not logged in?  No, there is no need to panic.  With this enhancement, whether the user is logged in or not, the event time will be shown based on the user's browser time zone setting.  

 

Let's Not Float Away

It's always a good idea to know where one is at any given time.  It ensures we act responsibly and correctly.  No less so in the SAP Community.  This is why we have delivered a new floating indicator to let users know if they are on a page for which there are restrictions.  Initially, the floating indicator will be used in the Partner groups, including the SuccessFactors group.  It will also be rolled out to closed groups as well (groups that require a user to join).

entry.title: Authors failing to create documentation in producer
entry.content:
Hi Community,

since some days our authors can not create documentation any longer, now myself included. We try normally to create a Word/PDF etc from a simulation.

We get this error message saying: "The opened object was disconnected from the client" and after this the producer crashes and restarts.

What could be here the issue?

Thanks and enjoy the weekend! 🙂

Mira

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence trial
entry.content: Hi @navalega0109, Process Governance is not included anymore in the free trial. Only Process Intelligence can now be activated additionally to Process Manager, Journey Modeller and Collaboration Hub.

entry.title: Re: Register Now for Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
Regaring my previous note, that registration was not possible:

There is now a Info that another way of registration is necessary:

It directs me to this:
The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Re... - SAP Community
The progress is better ... unfortunately I am a bit late for a few:


I suggest to change the blog post above and show the right path to register.  @maria_silipo 

Best regards
Christian
